title: sorbus oligodonta var. oligodonta
intro: Sorbus oligodonta var. oligodonta, also known as Chinese rowan, is a variety of flowering plant belonging to the Rosaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Sorbus oligodonta var. oligodonta include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant can be prepared as tea, decoction, or tincture for its medicinal uses, with the tea being the most commonly used form to support immune function and reduce inflammation.
